message:
feat(provider-metadata): add convenience aliases for Kimi, Vercel, and Azure providers

Add aliases that improve discoverability and match common user
expectations when referencing these providers by name:

- kimi-for-coding: add "kimi-coding" alias for shorter invocation
- vercel: add "vercel-ai-gateway" alias matching the service name
- azure-openai: add "azure-openai-responses" alias for the Responses
  API variant

Each alias is covered by unit tests verifying canonical_id resolution,
auth env key inheritance, and routing default propagation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
